title: Flaky Fried Venezuelan Potato Hash
description: A winey, flaky, brunch-mood Venezuelan dish featuring new potatoes, yuzu-cure, and halal-friendly ingredients, cooked to perfection on a tava-griddle.
instructions: Heat the tava-griddle over medium heat and brush with olive oil.
In a large bowl, combine grated potatoes, yuzu juice, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika, and mix well.
Using a spatula, shape the potato mixture into 4-6 patties, depending on desired size.
Add the patties to the preheated tava-griddle and cook for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Flip the patties gently to avoid breaking, and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the patties from the tava-griddle and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the Flaky Fried Venezuelan Potato Hash hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
